title: Shattering Russian Shoyu-Koji Bites
description: Crispy, flavorful bites featuring the unique umami of shoyu-koji. Perfect for a show-stopping appetizer or snack.

ingredients.name: gluten-free all-purpose flour
ingredients.notes: such as rice flour or almond flour

instructions: Combine flour, shoyu-koji, and sugar in a bowl.
Add water and mix until a dough forms.
Knead the dough for 5 minutes until smooth.
Divide the dough into 8 equal pieces.
Roll each piece into a ball and then flatten slightly.
Heat the vegetable oil in a deep frying pan to 375°F (190°C).
Fry the shoyu-koji bites in batches until golden brown, about 2-3 minutes per side.
Drain the bites on paper towels and sprinkle with salt.
Serve hot, garnished with chopped scallions if desired.
